pieces.title: Followspot
pieces.note: A restless beam hunts the dark. Move your finger — it will find you.

pieces.title: Barrel & Comb
pieces.note: Scratch the wheel like a record — pins pluck a comb and a tiny music box wakes up.

pieces.title: Afterlight
pieces.note: Wherever your eye lands, glows. Wherever it doesn't, the dark quietly takes it back.

pieces.title: Tell
pieces.note: Pick a side, over and over. Around the twentieth time, it stops being a guess.

pieces.title: House Style
pieces.note: Say what you mean. It will say it more nicely for you.
